title: Moving Stones Until Consecutive II
titleCn: 移动石子直到连续 II

testcases.input: stones = [7,4,9] Output: [1,2] Explanation: We can move 4 -> 8 for one move to finish the game. Or, we can move 9 -> 5, 4 -> 6 for two moves to finish the game.
testcases.expectedOutput: [1,2] Explanation: We can move 4 -> 8 for one move to finish the game. Or, we can move 9 -> 5, 4 -> 6 for two moves to finish the game.

testcases.input: stones = [6,5,4,3,10] Output: [2,3] Explanation: We can move 3 -> 8 then 10 -> 7 to finish the game. Or, we can move 3 -> 7, 4 -> 8, 5 -> 9 to finish the game. Notice we cannot move 10 -> 2 to finish the game, because that would be an illegal move.
testcases.expectedOutput: [2,3] Explanation: We can move 3 -> 8 then 10 -> 7 to finish the game. Or, we can move 3 -> 7, 4 -> 8, 5 -> 9 to finish the game. Notice we cannot move 10 -> 2 to finish the game, because that would be an illegal move.
